scene_title: Marca na testa — código QR bíblico
narrative_beat: A marca da besta atualizada para o século 21 — não 666 gravado a ferro, mas um código QR luminoso implantado na testa

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.depth_of_field: forehead and QR code in razor focus, background blurred

subject.primary: human forehead above eyebrows, skin in warm amber tones, a glowing crimson QR code mark embedded directly into the skin surface as if grown from within
subject.focal_point: the QR code mark itself, glowing crimson with golden edges
subject.secondary: golden circuit-board patterns emanating outward from the QR code through the skin like veins of light
props: crimson QR code embedded in forehead skin
golden circuit patterns radiating from QR code
resigned/controlled downward eyes barely visible at bottom frame edge
floating orange embers near the mark

environment.location: checkout line in a modern supermarket
environment.atmosphere: the horror of the banal — the mark of the beast in the checkout line

composition.rule: centered portrait — forehead and mark centered, Ken Burns very slow push-in toward the QR mark
composition.foreground: human forehead in warm amber skin tones with glowing crimson QR mark
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white supermarket checkout area — conveyor belt, register equipment, product shelves barely visible

lighting.key_light: warm amber key light from upper-left illuminating natural skin texture
lighting.fill_light: crimson QR code glow providing cold-warm fill upward across the face
lighting.rim_light: golden rim from circuit patterns along forehead hairline
lighting.mood: the mundane horror of prophecy fulfilled during a grocery trip

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: resigned acceptance, the horror of normalcy — the mark is already here and people are in line

symbolism.primary: the QR code as the modern mark of the beast — digital identifier required to buy and sell, embedded in the body
symbolism.secondary: the supermarket checkout background shows the mark is already integrated into commercial transactions

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
